category_sources: Official gnuplot documentation describes gnuplot as an interactive plotting program.
source_facts.description says it is a command-driven interactive function plotting tool.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use the name gnuplot.
docs_sources: Official gnuplot documentation page lists current online manuals, FAQ, and distribution documentation.
repo_sources: Official gnuplot FAQ/development documentation gives the SourceForge git clone URL for the development repository.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes plotting functions and data in 2D and 3D.
